notes: Ground-support and reconnaissance aircraft specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, found on Hills; its buildings can be placed on Hill tiles (terrainException). Wind Sanctuary builds Glider and Hot Air Balloon; Barracks (shared building type — see data/buildings/barracks.json for the full list of bases that build it) gives Windy Peaks its own infantry roster too. Wind Spire is the specialty defense — a Turret variant trading raw damage for knockback crowd control and a large anti-air damage bonus.
